---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What are you trying to do, and what makes it hard or impossible today?

## Proposed solution

The change or capability you would like to see.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you have thought about, and why they fall short.

## Additional context

How this fits with the existing design — the store, the retriever, the Hermes
provider, configuration — and anything else worth knowing.
